meaning: n.总经销商,有代销权的人或团体
examples: We do not measure subjective elements such as franchisee satisfaction or management style.
A McDonald's franchisee recently opened an electric-vehicle charging station in Cary, n.c..
Skinner didn't stop her, instead turning to the franchisee to ask him how hard it would be to put on a tie.
Every franchisee attends "Bug U" for classes in accounting, customer service, marketing and treating bacterial strains.
The franchisee, Restaurant Management Services Ltd, which operates 14 restaurants, has gone into administration.
